properties.action_jun08: struck Beirut Dahieh (Hezbollah HQ) — first strike since June 3 ceasefire renewal; 2 killed, 11 wounded; retaliation for Hezbollah fighter drone attack
fired 10+ BMs at Ramat David Airbase (Israel); first direct attack on Israel since April 8 ceasefire (60 days); FM calls Beirut strike 'ceasefire violation'; official says deal 'no longer feasible'

fired at least 10 BMs at Ramat David; at least 3 barrages; statement: targeted 'source of acts of aggression against Lebanese civilians'; warned 'broader response encompassing all US and Israeli targets'

told FT Netanyahu 'won't have any choice' but to accept deal; 'I call the shots. I call all the shots.'; called Netanyahu 'right now' not to retaliate; said 'We are very close to a final deal with Iran'; NBC: Iran 'strong, proud' but 'have no choice'; won't unfreeze assets before deal
office said Dahieh strike was response to Hezbollah fighter drone; told by Trump not to retaliate for Iran missiles; Trump: 'won't have any choice' but to accept deal
launched fighter drone at northern Israel (trigger for Dahieh strike); HQ in Dahieh struck
shot down 2 more IRGC one-way attack drones threatening Hormuz maritime traffic (June 7); second consecutive day; no US strike on Iranian territory

properties.status_jun08: CENTCOM intercepts 2 more IRGC drones; second consecutive day of Iranian drone launches toward waterway

properties.action_jun08: frozen asset redirect plan to Gulf allies continues; Trump says won't unfreeze before deal

properties.context: first Beirut strike since June 3 ceasefire renewal; retaliation for Hezbollah fighter drone

entities.name: Iran Missile Attack on Ramat David (Jun 8)

properties.context: first direct Iran-Israel attack since April 8 ceasefire (60 days); retaliation for Dahieh strike

properties.detail: Trump tells FT Netanyahu 'won't have any choice'; 'I call the shots. I call all the shots.'; called Netanyahu 'right now' not to retaliate; 'very close to a final deal'
Iranian official linked to talks: 'deal with Trump no longer feasible at this stage'; blames Trump for escalation; FM: Beirut strike was 'ceasefire violation', Iran exercised 'self-defense'

properties.status_jun08: IDF strikes Dahieh after June 3 ceasefire renewal; 2 killed, 11 wounded; Iran retaliates on Israel for Beirut strike
